eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mohave, AZ; at 3:38 PM on SEP 30, 2019 Effective until 1:38 AM OCT 1, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Mohave County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Mohave County Sheriff's Office is looking for a male Bruce Downey last seen on foot wearing an unknown color t-shirt, blue jean shorts and slippers. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
